commentary_text: The model favors Australia at 44%, while the sportsbook consensus backs Paraguay at 44% — a reversal of which team is favored. The model's 18-point edge on an Australia win contrasts with the market's 18-point edge on a Paraguay win. This gap could reflect recent form, injuries, or lineup changes that have shifted since the model's last update, or it may signal that real-money flows are pricing information the statistical forecast cannot yet access. The dashboard surfaces both views without endorsing either.
